underlying_goal: Get a summary/report of their recent Claude Code session activity over the last four weeks
friction_detail: Claude initially used the unified-insights skill when the user then asked for a non-unified-insights approach, requiring a second attempt.
brief_summary: User wanted insights reports on their last 4 weeks of sessions; Claude generated two reports (one via unified-insights skill, one raw) and opened the HTML report, though the user had to redirect away from the unified-insights skill once.
